name: Aarvee Denims and Exports Limited
summary: Aarvee Denims and Exports Limited engages in manufacturing and selling of fabrics in India and internationally. It operates in two segments, Textile and Windmill. The company offers cotton fibers; cotton and texturized yarns; ring, shirting, printed, stretch, satin, flat finish, special blend, LYCRA, and other denims; and non-denim fabrics. It is also involved in the wind power generation activities. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Ahmedabad, India.
